desc_en: Wide-angle introduction of a location — space, mood, context.
desc_de: Weitwinkel-Einführung eines Ortes. Raum, Stimmung, Kontext.
template: Film still from a [MODIFIER] [GENRE] film. [LOCATION] seen from [PERSPECTIVE] at [TIME_OF_DAY]. [DETAILS]. [LIGHT_SOURCE]. [WHAT_IS_DARK]. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK]. --ar 16:9 --raw

fields.placeholder_en: low-budget / independent / 1970s / European / Scandinavian
thriller / drama / horror / noir
A crumbling apartment block / An empty highway
fields.placeholder_de: Ein bröckelnder Wohnblock / Eine leere Autobahn

fields.placeholder_en: street level / above / the end of the alley
fields.placeholder_de: Straßenebene / von oben / das Ende der Gasse

fields.placeholder_en: night / late afternoon / dusk
broken windows, pooling water, a single lit room
fields.placeholder_de: zerbrochene Fenster, stehendes Wasser, ein einzelner beleuchteter Raum

fields.placeholder_en: Single sodium streetlight casting orange on wet pavement
fields.placeholder_de: Einzelne Natriumdampflampe, wirft Orange auf nassen Asphalt

fields.placeholder_en: Everything beyond 10 metres lost in fog
fields.placeholder_de: Alles jenseits von 10 Metern im Nebel verschwunden

fields.placeholder_en: Nobody is coming back.
examples: Too quiet for a place that looks lived-in.

desc_en: Alley, corridor, narrow interior — texture, light line, no fill.
desc_de: Gasse, Korridor, enger Innenraum. Textur, Lichtlinie, kein Fill.
template: Film still from a [MODIFIER] [GENRE] film shot on location. [SPACE]. [LIGHT_SOURCE] casting [WHAT_WHERE]. [WHAT_IS_DARK]. [SURFACE_TEXTURE]. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK], no fill light. --ar 16:9 --raw

fields.placeholder_en: low-budget / independent
thriller / noir
Narrow concrete corridor, damp walls, single overhead light

fields.placeholder_en: Bare bulb at the end of the corridor
fields.placeholder_de: Nackte Glühbirne am Ende des Korridors

fields.placeholder_en: a narrow strip of light on the floor tiles
fields.placeholder_de: ein schmaler Lichtstreifen auf den Bodenfliesen

fields.placeholder_en: Both ends of the corridor swallowed in darkness
fields.placeholder_de: Beide Enden des Korridors von Dunkelheit verschluckt

fields.placeholder_en: Peeling paint, water stains, iron railing
Feels like escape. Or exposure.

desc_en: Object or texture in close-up — light on the object, the rest in shadow.
desc_de: Objekt oder Textur im CU. Licht auf das Objekt, Rest im Dunkel.
template: Film still, [TIME_OF_DAY] exterior, [GENRE]. Close-up of [OBJECT] in [CONTEXT]. [LIGHT_SOURCE] illuminates [WHAT], rest in [DARK_BLUR]. [TEXTURE]. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK]. --ar 16:9 --raw

fields.placeholder_en: night / late afternoon
thriller / drama
a rusted padlock / a torn photograph / a cracked phone screen
fields.placeholder_de: ein verrostetes Vorhängeschloss / ein zerrissenes Foto / ein zerbrochener Handy-Bildschirm

fields.placeholder_en: the corner of a bare wooden table
Sidelight from a half-open window
fields.placeholder_de: Seitenlicht aus einem halb offenen Fenster

fields.placeholder_en: only the front face of the padlock
shallow focus blur / deep black
Pitted metal surface, flaking rust
The kind of afternoon that never ends.
fields.placeholder_de: The kind of afternoon that never ends.
examples: The kind of afternoon that never ends.

desc_en: Figure partly in shadow — prevents the 'sticker effect'. Only the visible area is lit.
desc_de: Figur teilweise im Schatten. Verhindert 'Sticker-Effekt'. Nur sichtbarer Bereich lit.
template: Film still from a [MODIFIER] [GENRE] film shot on location. [FIGURE] seen from [PERSPECTIVE] in [LOCATION]. [LIGHT_SOURCE]. Only [VISIBLE_AREA], rest of figure in [SHADOW]. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK]. --ar 16:9 --raw

The kind of loneliness you chose.

desc_en: Object or room without people — often before or after a major scene.
desc_de: Objekt oder Raum ohne Personen. Häufig vor/nach großer Szene.

A telephone off the hook / An unmade bed / A stopped clock

fields.placeholder_en: Nobody is coming back.
examples: The kind of afternoon that never ends.

desc_en: Material and light only — strong light-to-shadow falloff, no subject.
desc_de: Nur Material und Licht. Starker Hell-Dunkel-Falloff. Kein Subjekt.
template: [TIME_OF_DAY] exterior, [GENRE] film. [SURFACE] lit by [LIGHT_SOURCE] from [DIRECTION]. Strong light-to-shadow falloff. [VISIBLE_AREA], rest in deep black. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK]. --ar 16:9 --raw
